query: Santa Catarina ICU occupancy June 2026 UTI ocupação leitos respiratório
answer:
Based on my thorough attempt to gather this data, I must report that all web search and fetch tools are unavailable in this session. Below is my synthesis based on background knowledge and known data sources.

---

## Santa Catarina ICU (UTI) Occupancy — June 2026: Research Report

### Data Availability Status
**No live June 2026 data could be retrieved.** All web search and web fetch tools were unavailable during this research session. The findings below are based on structural/historical knowledge and source identification.

### Known Infrastructure (Pre-2025 Baseline)
- Santa Catarina maintains approximately **1,500–2,000 adult ICU (UTI) beds** across SUS (public) and private networks statewide.
- The state is divided into macro health regions: Grande Florianópolis, Vale do Itajaí, Norte/Nordeste, Planalto Serrano, Oeste, Sul, Foz do Rio Itajaí, and Meio Oeste/Serra Catarinense.
- During the COVID-19 pandemic peaks (2020–2022), SC expanded ICU capacity significantly; some of those surge beds were later decommissioned.

### Seasonal Context
- **June marks the onset of the Southern Hemisphere respiratory season** (winter: June–August). Santa Catarina, as a southern state, is typically among the first and hardest hit by influenza, RSV, and other respiratory pathogens.
- Historically, respiratory UTI occupancy in SC has climbed to **70–90%+** in peak winter weeks, particularly in the Grande Florianópolis, Vale do Itajaí, and Norte/Nordeste macro-regions.

### Authoritative Data Sources (Recommended for Live Data)
| Source | URL | Data Type |
|---|---|---|
| SES-SC Painel de Leitos | saude.sc.gov.br | Real-time ICU bed occupancy dashboard |
| DIVE-SC Boletim Epidemiológico | dive.sc.gov.br | Weekly SRAG/respiratory surveillance bulletins |
| Fiocruz InfoGripe | info.gripe.fiocruz.br | Weekly SRAG hospitalization trends by state |
| OpenDataSUS | opendatasus.saude.gov.br | SRAG hospitalization microdata |
| CNES/DataSUS | cnes.datasus.gov.br | Registered bed counts by facility/state |

### Limitations
- **No real-time occupancy percentages, bed counts, or respiratory-specific UTI data for June 2026 were obtainable.**
- All quantitative figures cited are historical baselines, not current values.
- The caller should treat this as a **data gap** requiring manual consultation of the sources above.

key_facts: No live June 2026 ICU occupancy data for Santa Catarina could be retrieved — all web search/fetch tools were unavailable during this session.
Santa Catarina has approximately 1,500–2,000 adult ICU (UTI) beds across public (SUS) and private networks (historical baseline, pre-2025).
June is the start of the Southern Hemisphere winter respiratory season; SC is typically among the earliest and hardest-hit Brazilian states.
Historical respiratory UTI occupancy in Santa Catarina has reached 70–90%+ during peak winter weeks.
Key live-data sources: SES-SC Painel de Leitos (saude.sc.gov.br), DIVE-SC bulletins (dive.sc.gov.br), Fiocruz InfoGripe (info.gripe.fiocruz.br), OpenDataSUS, and CNES/DataSUS.
Santa Catarina is divided into macro health regions; occupancy rates vary significantly by region, with Grande Florianópolis and Vale do Itajaí often showing highest pressure.
